title: Limitless
description: Pretty much removes height limits in the overworld and in the end
body:
This is a very simple datapack which extends the height limit of the overworld and the end to 1967 and 2031 respectively, effectively removing it.

Leave a comment on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/limitless-5902909/)!

This datapack uses experimental features and a warning will appear when loading it on a single player world.
